{{Infobox character
| name = Telappen Vashei
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|President Vashei was the President of the [[Galactic Union]] a little over a hundred years ago.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Telappen Vashei]] was President of the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40" />}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Telappen Vashei]] was a stern but kind human woman.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c41">''The Pilot'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Telappen Vashei]] had iron-gray hair.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c41" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
